summary: Iteration 2 full regression: 9/9 backend pytest cases pass (health, dynamic+static sitemap/robots, contact/booking POST+GET persistence, 422 validation). Frontend: hero H1 contains 'UK brands' + 'online sales'; brand strip lists all 5 named brands (London RAG, Shaze, Livetech, Tvam, PlayPanda); How It Works + FAQ visible on home; 3 JSON-LD scripts on home (Organization + LocalBusiness + FAQPage); nav has no Birmingham subtext and includes all 8 items (Home/Services/International/Case Studies/About/Team/Insights/Contact); footer disclaimer removed and 'Company registration' text present; Team page shows Shweta → Zain → Sunny with correct roles (Founder & Director / Strategic Advisor / Lead Consultant) and /team/shweta.png, zain.png, sunny.jpg all return HTTP 200; Blog list shows exactly 35 posts, Amazon category filter narrows to 8, search 'amazon' narrows to 10; blog post detail /blog/how-to-sell-on-amazon-uk-founder-guide-2026 renders H1, 5 H2 subheadings, 'Book a Discovery Call' CTA, Related section, BlogPosting JSON-LD; Services page shows all 6 pillars (Marketplace Management, Shopify & Website Optimisation, Ecommerce SEO, Social Media Marketing, Paid Advertising, Full Account Management) each with problem/approach/included/outcome; Contact page has 'Book a Discovery Call' CTA and 'growth challenge' label with 3-field message form (name/email/textarea); NO banned CTA language ('free strategy call'/'free audit'/'free consultation'/'book a strategy call'/'book a free') found anywhere on the 9 pages scanned; Mobile 390x844 nav-mobile-toggle opens menu with all 8 items and WhatsApp FAB href contains wa.me/447309721673.
passed_checks: GET /api/health → 200 {status: ok}
GET /api/sitemap.xml → 200 XML with all 8 static routes + 35 blog URLs
GET /api/robots.txt → 200 text/plain with Allow + Sitemap directives
GET /sitemap.xml (static CRA) → 200 XML
GET /robots.txt (static CRA) → 200 text
POST /api/contact minimal {name,email,message} → 200; GET /api/contact returns record (persistence verified)
POST /api/contact invalid → 422
POST /api/bookings {name,email,preferred_date,preferred_time} → 200; GET /api/bookings returns record
POST /api/bookings invalid → 422
Home hero H1 contains 'UK brands' and 'online sales'
'Book a Discovery Call' CTA present on home, services, contact, blog post
Brand strip shows London RAG, Shaze, Livetech, Tvam, PlayPanda
How It Works section visible on home
FAQ section visible on home
JSON-LD Organization + LocalBusiness present on home (3 ld+json tags total incl. FAQ)
Nav logo has NO 'UK · Birmingham' subtext
Nav shows all 8 items: Home, Services, International, Case Studies, About, Team, Insights, Contact
Footer has no GlobeSync disclaimer; contains 'Company registration'
International Expansion page loads with region cards (UK, US, Middle East, SEA)
Team page order: Shweta (Founder & Director) → Zain (Strategic Advisor) → Sunny (Lead Consultant)
Team images /team/shweta.png, /team/zain.png, /team/sunny.jpg all return HTTP 200 (visually rendered)
Blog list shows exactly 35 posts
Blog Amazon category filter narrows to 8 posts
Blog search 'amazon' narrows results
Blog post detail: H1 + 5 H2 subheadings + Related section + Discovery CTA + BlogPosting JSON-LD
Services page shows all 6 pillars each with problem/approach/included/outcome (6 occurrences of each keyword)
Contact page: Discovery CTA + 'growth challenge' label + Send-Message tab has 3 fields
No banned 'free strategy/free audit/free consultation/book a strategy call/book a free' CTA phrase on any of the 9 pages scanned
Mobile 390x844: nav-mobile-toggle opens menu with all 8 items stacked
WhatsApp FAB present on home + mobile with href wa.me/447309721673
critical_code_review_comments: Services pillar titles differ slightly from problem-statement labels: 'Shopify & Website Optimisation' (vs 'Shopify'), 'Ecommerce SEO' (vs 'SEO'), 'Social Media Marketing' (vs 'Social'), 'Paid Advertising' (vs 'Paid Ads'). Content matches intent — noting for main agent in case exact wording is required.

backend server.py: _booking_html subject still says 'New Strategy Call Booking' internally (H2 in the outgoing email HTML). Not user-facing on the site, but if the 'no strategy call' rule extends to outgoing emails it should be updated to 'Discovery Call'.

Blog copy contains the word 'free' in organic content (e.g. 'free volume', 'A+ content is free CVR uplift') — these are NOT CTAs so they don't violate the no-'Free' rule, but flagging for editorial awareness.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth on this site
seed_data_creation: Test rows created via POST /api/contact and /api/bookings with 'TEST_' prefixed names for easy identification. Not cleaned up (public app, low volume).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — 9 tests, run with `pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Sitemap has 8 static + 35 blog URLs. Blog uses <a href='/blog/{slug}'> cards; search input is a native <input> with placeholder 'Search'; category filter buttons are role=button. Contact page BookingForm is default tab; Send-a-message tab exposes 3-field form (name/email/textarea with 'growth challenge' label). WhatsApp number: wa.me/447309721673. Team images live at /team/shweta.png, /team/zain.png, /team/sunny.jpg — CDN rejects HEAD requests (403) but GET returns 200; use GET when scripting.
